hero.headline: Close More Deals In Less Time
hero.description: We combine fast lending with an automated follow-up system so you can convert more leads into appointments and more appointments into closings.

problem.title: Why Agents Lose Deals
problem.intro: Most agents are doing great work, but the process breaks in key moments.
items: Leads go cold without consistent follow-up
problem.result: Result: deals are lost without noticing.

lending.title: Fast, Reliable Lending
items: Flexible programs, including lower credit profiles

crm.title: Automated Agent Social CRM
items: Automated follow-up by SMS, email, and social

differentiator.title: We Are Not Just A Lender
differentiator.description: Most lenders help with the mortgage. We help with the mortgage and the system that creates and closes more deals.

partner.name: Partner Plan

advanced.name: Advanced Plan

results.title: What You Can Expect
items: Close more deals in less time

callGuide.title: Simple Call Flow For Your Team
callGuide.hook: 1. Hook: We help agents close more deals by combining fast lending with an automated system.
callGuide.problem: 2. Problem: Many agents lose leads because follow-up is late or the process is slow.
callGuide.solution: 3. Solution: We solve that with quick pre-approvals plus CRM automation.
callGuide.offer: 4. Offer: Several agents use this with no monthly fee by partnering with us.
callGuide.close: 5. Close: The best next step is a 15-minute demo. Is today or tomorrow better?

phrases.title: Natural Phrases Your Agents Can Use
items: This is not just a CRM.
This helps you stop losing opportunities.
It is basically a system that works for you.
Most agents do not realize how much they leave on the table.

finalCta.title: See It In Action
finalCta.description: In 15 minutes, we show how it works, how to apply it to your business, and how to start without complexity.
finalCta.positioning: We are not only lenders. We are the system that helps you close more deals.
